voting_section.title: Vote Here
voting_section.period_not_started: Voting period has not started or has ended
voting_section.error_not_registered_title: You are not registered as a voter
voting_section.error_not_registered_msg: To participate in the election, you must first be registered as a voter. Please contact the election committee.
voting_section.error_approval_pending_title: Your voter status is pending approval
voting_section.error_approval_pending_msg: Your voter application has been received. Once approved by the election committee, you will be able to vote.
voting_section.period_inactive_msg1: You are eligible to vote, but the voting period has not started yet.
voting_section.period_inactive_msg2: • This button will become active when voting is started by election administrators

results_section.not_published_msg: This link will be active after the election is completed.

help_section.title: Need Help?
help_section.description: If you need any assistance, please contact us.
